details.text: Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

examples.corrected: prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test
